mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card behavior on Print and Payment History page when a plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages, additional pages, progress bars, tooltips, and page count displays.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: No printer enrollment methods, API helpers, or enrollment page objects found in this batch. Batch 12 contains dashboard pages, side menu, admin page, HP ID authentication, and landing page - none of which handle printer enrollment. Enrollment functionality likely exists in enrollment flow page objects or API helper modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No API helpers or subscription verification methods found in this batch. This precondition requires backend API calls to check subscription state. API helper modules likely exist in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods or API helpers found in this batch. The dashboard_hp_smart_page.py has a 'subscription_state' locator but no methods to verify the status value. API verification methods likely exist in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: No pause plan button, CIT modal, or pause plan action methods found in this batch. The dashboard_hp_smart_page.py contains various dashboard elements but no pause plan controls. Pause plan functionality likely exists in overview or plan management page objects in other batches.

matched_page_objects.class_purpose: Encapsulates all UI elements and navigation methods for the dashboard side menu component. Provides locators for all menu items including Instant Ink submenu items (Overview, Update Plan, Print History, Shipment Tracking) and Account submenu items (Shipping & Billing, Notifications). Contains intelligent click methods that automatically handle parent menu expansion for nested menu items and mobile layout menu expansion.
matched_page_objects.relevance_reason: This test case requires navigating to the Print and Payment History page in steps 1 and 4. DashboardSideMenuPage provides the click_print_history() method and print_history_menu_link locator specifically for this navigation. The method automatically handles menu expansion for both desktop and mobile layouts, making it the correct component for navigating to the target page.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Print and Payment History menu item under the HP Instant Ink section. Navigates to the history page showing past printing activity and payment transactions.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Steps 1 and 4 require navigating to the Print and Payment History page. This locator targets the exact menu item that performs this navigation. It is used by the click_print_history() method to navigate to the target page.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Clicks the Print and Payment History menu item in the side navigation to navigate to the history page. Calls self._click_with_instant_ink_expansion(self.print_history_menu_link) which automatically handles mobile menu expansion and Instant Ink parent menu expansion if needed before clicking the Print History link.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Steps 1 and 4 both require navigating to the Print and Payment History page. This method performs exactly that action with intelligent handling of menu expansion for both mobile and desktop layouts. It is the primary navigation method for reaching the page where all subsequent test verifications occur.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 1 expected result is inferred as 'Print and Payment History page is loaded'. No page load verification methods or Print and Payment History page object found in this batch. The target page object with billing cycle card elements is not in batch 12. Page load verification methods likely exist in the actual PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage class in other batches.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data needed for this navigation step. The click_print_history() method does not require any parameters.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the Billing Cycle Period card.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is not displayed.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 2 requires locating and verifying the Billing Cycle Period card and checking that plan pause information is NOT displayed. No Print and Payment History page object, billing cycle card locators, or plan pause information elements found in this batch. These components are specific to the Print and Payment History page which is not included in batch 12.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data needed for this verification step.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Even shift 32 days and trigger billing charge.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 3 expected results are inferred as API response verification. No API helpers or verification methods found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 3 requires 32 days as test data for time shift. No constants or configuration values for this found in batch 12.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 4 expected result is inferred as 'Page loaded with updated data'. No page load verification methods or Print and Payment History page object found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data needed for this navigation step.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the Billing Cycle Period card.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 5 requires verifying that plan pause information IS now displayed on the Billing Cycle Period card. No Print and Payment History page object or billing cycle card elements found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data needed for this verification step.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the Complimentary pages progress bar is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 6 requires verifying the Complimentary pages progress bar. No progress bar locators or verification methods found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data needed for this verification step.

step_level_mapping.step_action: For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify a tooltip with correct message is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 7 requires hovering/clicking info icon and verifying tooltip. No info icon locators, tooltip locators, or responsive interaction methods found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 7 requires device type detection and expected tooltip message. No device detection utilities or tooltip message constants found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the value is displayed as "0 of 10(Pause Plan) used".

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 8 requires reading and verifying the Complimentary pages value text. No complimentary pages value locators or text getter methods found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 8 requires expected value '0 of 10(Pause Plan) used'. No constants for this expected value found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the information with correct plan info is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 9 requires reading and verifying the info message below Complimentary pages. No message locators or text verification methods found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 9 requires expected plan info message content. No constants for expected message found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Print some pages(less than the plan, such as 6 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the "Complimentary pages" progress bar is filled with the black color and the value is displayed as correct (such as "6 of 10 used").

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 10 requires verifying progress bar color and value after printing. No progress bar locators, color verification methods, or value text locators found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 10 requires 6 pages to print and expected values. No API helpers for printing simulation or constants for expected values found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Continue to print some pages(more than the plan, such as 15 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the progress bars for "Complimentary pages" and "Additional pages" are displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 11 requires verifying both Complimentary and Additional pages progress bars. No progress bar locators or verification methods found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 11 requires printing to reach 15 total pages. No API helpers for printing or page count constants found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the progress bar is filled with the Yellow color and the value is displayed correctly(such as "5 of 10 used").

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 12 requires verifying Additional pages progress bar color and value. No additional pages progress bar locators or color verification methods found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 12 requires expected value '5 of 10 used' and yellow color. No constants for these expected values found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the icon. For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the info icon is displayed well behind the string "Additional pages". Verify a tooltip with correct message is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 13 requires verifying Additional pages info icon and tooltip. No info icon locators or tooltip verification methods found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 13 requires device type detection and expected tooltip message. No device detection utilities or tooltip constants found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the message below "Additional pages". Check the Complimentary pages progress bar. Check total pages printed info.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify a message with the amount of blocks already bought is displayed well. Verify the "Complimentary pages" progress bar is full filled with the black color and the value is displayed correctly (such as "10 of 10 used"). Verify correct number(such as 15 pages) displayed according to the printed pages.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 14 requires verifying multiple elements: Additional pages message, Complimentary pages progress bar at 100%, and total pages count. No locators or verification methods for any of these found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 14 requires expected values '10 of 10 used' and '15 pages'. No constants for these expected values found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Verify the test case is complete.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Step 15 is a summary step confirming all previous steps passed. No specific verification components needed from this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data needed for this summary step.
